adversarial.description: Beyond re-running all 12 contract verifications to EXIT:0: (E01) the anti-vacuity probe confirms AGF at HEAD~1 was 'The Four Agent Roles' with no Orchestrator row, no Section 11, no vlib_word_present; (E03) confirms the 5-role/5-profile correspondence now holds and the 06_release_train concession is retired (a negated grep that the concession phrase is GONE); (E09) proves the new fixture is load-bearing -- corrupting word_present_fail.md to contain a whole-word 'new' makes the self-test FAIL -- probed in a minimal scratch copy under a session-scratch root, exactly the Section 11 probe-isolation rule this feature adds. The primitive's whole-word discrimination was independently re-checked ('renewed' rejected, 'a new thing' accepted).
adversarial.process_note: Single-session collapsed-role execution -- now itself disclosed-and-permitted by the new AGF Orchestrator clause. E10 dogfoods the NDEBT-019 rc-capture rule (explicit out=$(cmd); rc=$?; test $rc -eq 0 for both validate.sh invocations). All adversarial mutation stays in scratch; the real tree is never mutated.

evidence_bundle_check.diff_patch_reasoning: .agent/evidence/053/diff.patch is `git diff HEAD~1..HEAD` at deliverable commit b848aac; E11 independently re-asserts HEAD~1..HEAD touches exactly the twelve contracted files and no .agent path.
evidence_bundle_check.flat_files: 12 per-entry captures 053-verify-01..12.txt + the consolidated 053/verification.txt (12 EXIT:0 markers) + 053/diff.patch.

acceptance_reconciliation.summary: AT1 ('AGF Section 2 defines the Orchestrator and every load-bearing cross-reference resolves to it') -> E02 (definition + field ownership) + E03 (capability_profiles/permission_classes/mcp_policy/06 resolve; 5-role/5-profile; concession retired) + E04 (3 stale AGF descriptions fixed). AT2 ('methodology/02 carries the probe-isolation, rc-capture, and five-class authoring rules as document-binding requirements with proven fixes') -> E05 (Section 11) + E06 (Section 10 (e)) + E07 (Section 12, all five classes). AT3 ('new/updated verify_lib.sh helpers are fixture-tested') -> E08 (vlib_word_present discriminates + both fixtures exercised by the self-test) + E09 (fixture load-bearing) + E10 (self-test 43/43). All three acceptance tests are covered by executed evidence.

non_blocking_observations: FOUNDATIONAL STANDARDS CHANGE (disclosed): F-053 redefines standard/AGF.md's role model ('The Four Agent Roles' -> a coordinating Orchestrator plus four execution roles). This is additive and reconciling -- it defines a role every other governance file already referenced -- and is exactly what NDEBT-010's remediation prescribed ('a deliberate standards change to route through the next planned phase'). Surfaced to the operator at PR review as the steer point for the design.

NEXT-FEATURE CHOICE was abort-driven (disclosed): the AskUserQuestion selecting the next ungated root aborted (permission stream closed, as before feature 050); proceeded with the recommended 053 under the phase activation's standing authorization + the operator's 'Continue', with the PR as the redirect mechanism. Not blocking; fully reversible on the branch before merge.

NDEBT-014 PARTIAL MECHANIZATION (disclosed, by design): of the three helpers NDEBT-014 floated, only the whole-word matcher (vlib_word_present) is added as a standalone primitive; the HEAD-anchored anti-vacuity and two-part .agent immutability fixes are documented as authoring PATTERNS in Section 12, not pure functions ('where mechanizable' per the row's own remediation). Stated plainly in the DEBT resolution and contract non_goals.

PR #32 REVIEW HARDENING (disclosed): CodeRabbit flagged that E08/E09's negative assertions used `test $rc -ne 0` (Section 10(e) requires the specific exit code) and that E09 derived its scratch path from an unguarded $SB (Section 11 fail-closed/scratch-only). Both now assert `test $rc -eq 1`, and E09 fails closed on an unset/relative $SB and refuses any scratch path inside the repo; E08/E09 were re-run to EXIT:0 with the tightened assertions. The verdict is unchanged (12/12) -- the fixes make the feature's own tests exemplify the rules it codifies.

final_verdict.summary: Feature 053 APPROVED. All 12 contract verifications re-run to EXIT:0. The Orchestrator is defined in AGF Section 2 with its owned run_state fields, every load-bearing cross-reference resolves (5-role/5-profile; the release-train concession retired; 3 stale AGF descriptions fixed); methodology/02 binds the probe-isolation (Section 11), exit-code (Section 10 e), and five-class (Section 12) rules; vlib_word_present is fixture-tested and proven load-bearing. Self-sweeps unchanged (13/13, 11/11), self-test 43/43, e2e green. Scope UNDER estimate (221 vs 260). Three disclosed non-blocking items ride to the operator: the foundational standards change, the abort-driven feature choice, and NDEBT-014's partial mechanization.
